pages.title: Law enforcement
pages.metaDescription: Encrypted push-to-talk for police and law enforcement — dispatch console, GPS, emergency alerts, audit logs, and Pro tier plate lookup.
pages.headline: Private PTT built for police operations
pages.intro: Give patrol, investigations, and special units a encrypted push-to-talk network on Android phones and rugged Inrico handsets — with dispatch oversight, searchable logs, and optional AI-assisted workflows on Pro.

useCases.title: Patrol & field units
useCases.body: Hardware PTT on Inrico IRC590 and TM-7 Plus, or BYOD Android with on-screen PTT. Live GPS feeds the dispatch map.

useCases.title: Dispatch oversight
useCases.body: safeT Command monitors every talkgroup, tone-outs pages, and logs every transmission with auto-transcription.

useCases.title: Emergency response
useCases.body: Dedicated emergency key clears the channel and alerts dispatch with priority — acknowledge and resolve from the console.

useCases.title: Investigations & accountability
useCases.body: Searchable transmission history supports after-action review. Add unlimited log retention for longer investigations.

features: Live unit mapping in safeT Command
Pro: plate lookup & AI dispatch (where enabled)
Session control — newest sign-in wins on lost devices
pages.complianceNote: Law enforcement agencies should review our Trust Center and request a security packet to evaluate alignment with CJIS and local policy. We do not claim CJIS certification today.
pages.cta: Request a law enforcement demo or start a 7-day trial.

pages.title: Fire & EMS
pages.metaDescription: Push-to-talk for fire, EMS, and emergency medical services — tone-outs, multi-channel dispatch, GPS, and emergency alerts.
pages.headline: Coordinate fire and EMS on one private network
pages.intro: Run battalion, EMS, and command talkgroups on a single encrypted platform. Dispatch tone-outs pages, monitors multiple channels, and sees every unit on the map — from the station, the rig, or the field.

useCases.title: Multi-channel dispatch
useCases.body: Mission Control lets dispatch monitor fire, EMS, and command channels simultaneously with priority scan.

useCases.title: Tone-outs & paging
useCases.body: Page a channel with routine, priority, or status tones — familiar radio workflow in the browser.

useCases.title: Incident comms
useCases.body: Spin up dedicated talkgroups in Control before major events. Units switch channels from the handset without re-provisioning.

useCases.title: After-action & QA
useCases.body: Recorded transmissions with auto-transcription support EMS QA, training review, and incident documentation.

features: Live GPS for apparatus and field units
Inrico rugged handsets with hardware PTT
Unlimited log retention add-on for long-term archive
pages.complianceNote: EMS agencies handling PHI should evaluate voice log retention and HIPAA requirements with their compliance officer. Business Associate Agreements available on request.
pages.cta: Put your fire and EMS units on the air with a free 7-day trial.

pages.title: Healthcare security
pages.metaDescription: Push-to-talk for hospital security and healthcare campus safety — encrypted voice, emergency alerts, GPS, and audit-friendly logs.
pages.headline: Hospital and campus security communications
pages.intro: Hospital security, behavioral health units, and medical campus officers need instant voice, emergency escalation, and documentation — without consumer walkie-talkie apps on personal phones.

useCases.title: Officer safety
useCases.body: Hardware emergency button on Inrico handsets or in-app emergency alert — dispatch sees priority notification and unit location.

useCases.title: Multi-building campuses
useCases.body: LTE and Wi-Fi coverage across buildings beats conventional radio dead zones in hospitals and parking structures.

useCases.title: Shift coordination
useCases.body: Separate talkgroups for patrol, ER, parking, and supervisors. Dispatchers included free — no per-dispatcher seat fees.

useCases.title: Incident documentation
useCases.body: Searchable call history supports security incident reports and post-event review. Retention configurable per agency policy.

features: Private encrypted agency network — not a public channel app
Live GPS mapping for officer locations
Rugged Inrico handsets for hands-busy environments
pages.complianceNote: Healthcare environments may involve PHI in voice communications. Review retention settings and request a security packet and BAA before deploying in clinical areas.
pages.cta: Contact sales for healthcare security deployments or start a trial for evaluation.

pages.title: Search & rescue / CERT
pages.metaDescription: Push-to-talk for volunteer SAR, CERT, and disaster response teams — rugged handsets, emergency alerts, and fast deployment on LTE.
pages.headline: Volunteer and disaster response communications
pages.intro: Search and rescue teams, CERT units, and disaster volunteers need instant voice that works across jurisdictions on everyday Android phones or rugged Inrico handsets — without consumer walkie-talkie apps on public channels.

useCases.title: Multi-team coordination
useCases.body: Separate talkgroups for search teams, staging, logistics, and command. Dispatch monitors all channels from safeT Command.

useCases.title: Volunteer rapid deploy
useCases.body: Agency admin creates accounts in Control, shares the APK link, and volunteers sideload safeT Mobile — on the air in under an hour with the Android setup guide.

useCases.title: Weak-cell and rural ops
useCases.body: LTE handsets with Codec2 low-bandwidth mode and hardware PTT on IRC590 radios for field teams spread across terrain.

useCases.title: Emergency escalation
useCases.body: Hardware or in-app emergency button alerts command with priority and GPS — critical when a searcher is overdue or injured.

features: Inrico IRC590 ultracompact rugged LTE radio
Live GPS on the dispatch map
Optional monitor of legacy radio via stream bridges — see /interoperability
pages.complianceNote: Volunteer organizations should coordinate with their sponsoring agency on data retention and logging policies. Request a security packet at /trust for grant or mutual-aid agreements.
pages.cta: Start a 7-day trial for your SAR or CERT team, or contact sales for multi-team deployments.
